source_name: Clean Energy Council - renewable capacity pipeline

fields.scope: Clean Energy Council Project Tracker covers grid-scale renewables under construction or financially committed. Rooftop solar tracked separately via Clean Energy Regulator STC register.
fields.primary_source_document: Clean Energy Council, Project Tracker (quarterly); Clean Energy Regulator, Small-scale Renewable Energy Scheme reports.
fields.keying_plan: Key wind and utility solar under construction (MW), rooftop solar cumulative installed (MW DC), and pumped hydro committed (MW). Snowy 2.0 (2,200 MW) and Pioneer-Burdekin (proposed) are the pumped-hydro anchors.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed renewable pipeline figures. Australia's rooftop solar penetration is among the world's highest (>3.5M households). Utility-scale build-out is constrained by transmission and connection delays as much as project economics.
citation: Clean Energy Council, Project Tracker; Clean Energy Regulator, Small-scale Renewable Energy Scheme reports.
